message:
test: add comprehensive test infrastructure with logging and snapshots

This commit establishes the test infrastructure for rich_rust, including
structured logging for debugging and golden file (snapshot) testing for
visual regression detection.

## Test Infrastructure Components

### tests/common/mod.rs - Logging Infrastructure
Structured logging using the tracing ecosystem for test debugging:

**Core Functions**
- init_test_logging(): Initialize tracing subscriber with test writer
- init_test_logging_with_filter(): Custom verbosity per module
- test_phase(): Create named spans for test phases (setup/execute/verify)
- log_test_context(): Record test metadata

**Features**
- Automatic test writer output (captured by cargo test)
- ANSI colors for readable local development
- File and line number information
- Thread IDs for concurrent test debugging
- Target filtering for module-specific logging
- JSON output mode for CI parsing (TEST_LOG_JSON=1)

**Environment Variables**
- RUST_LOG=debug: Enable debug logging
- RUST_LOG=rich_rust::color=trace: Module-specific tracing
- TEST_LOG_JSON=1: Machine-readable JSON output

### tests/common/assertions.rs - Logged Assertions
10 assertion helper functions with automatic logging:

- assert_eq_logged(): Equality with context logging
- assert_true_logged(), assert_false_logged(): Boolean assertions
- assert_ok_logged(), assert_err_logged(): Result assertions
- assert_some_logged(), assert_none_logged(): Option assertions
- assert_contains_logged(), assert_not_contains_logged(): String content
- assert_approx_eq_logged(): Floating point with epsilon
- assert_len_logged(): Collection length verification

All functions log at DEBUG level on entry, ERROR on failure,
and TRACE on success, providing detailed context for CI debugging.

### tests/logging_test.rs - Logging Integration Tests
14 test cases verifying the logging infrastructure:

- test_logging_infrastructure_works: Full phase demonstration
- test_logged_assertions_basic: Integer, string, boolean checks
- test_logged_assertions_result: Result<T, E> handling
- test_logged_assertions_option: Option<T> handling
- test_logged_assertions_collection: Length and contains checks
- test_with_rich_rust_types: Integration with Color, Style types
- Module self-tests for assertions.rs and mod.rs

### tests/golden_test.rs - Snapshot Testing (31 tests)
Visual regression testing using the insta crate:

**Rule Tests (4)**
- golden_rule_simple: Basic horizontal line
- golden_rule_with_title: Centered title
- golden_rule_left_aligned: Left-aligned title
- golden_rule_right_aligned: Right-aligned title

**Panel Tests (5)**
- golden_panel_simple: Basic bordered box
- golden_panel_with_title: Title in border
- golden_panel_with_title_and_subtitle: Both title and subtitle
- golden_panel_square: Square corner style
- golden_panel_ascii: ASCII-safe borders

**Table Tests (5)**
- golden_table_basic: Simple key-value table
- golden_table_with_title: Titled table with alignment
- golden_table_ascii: ASCII border style
- golden_table_no_header: Header-less table
- golden_table_wide: Multi-column with min widths

**Tree Tests (3)**
- golden_tree_simple: Flat children
- golden_tree_nested: Deep hierarchy
- golden_tree_ascii: ASCII guide characters

**Columns Tests (2)**
- golden_columns_basic: Equal-width columns
- golden_columns_multiline: Multi-line content

**Progress Bar Tests (4)**
- golden_progress_bar_empty: 0% progress
- golden_progress_bar_half: 50% progress
- golden_progress_bar_full: 100% progress
- golden_progress_bar_ascii: ASCII style bar

**Text Tests (1)**
- golden_text_wrapped: Long text in narrow panel

**Combined Tests (1)**
- golden_combined_rules_and_panels: Multiple components

**Edge Cases (4)**
- golden_empty_table: Table with no rows
- golden_single_cell_table: Minimal table
- golden_panel_empty: Empty content panel
- golden_rule_very_short: Minimum width rule

## Running Tests

```bash
# Run all tests with logging
RUST_LOG=debug cargo test -- --nocapture

# Run specific test suite
cargo test --test golden_test
cargo test --test logging_test

# Update snapshots after intentional changes
cargo insta test --accept

# Review pending snapshots interactively
cargo insta review
```

## Directory Structure

```
tests/
├── common/
│   ├── mod.rs        # Logging infrastructure
│   └── assertions.rs # Logged assertion helpers
├── logging_test.rs   # Logging integration tests
├── golden_test.rs    # Snapshot/golden file tests
└── golden/
    ├── fixtures/     # Input data for tests
    └── expected/     # Golden output files (managed by insta)
```

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
